reports.title: Crown Jewel Assets
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true}) RETURN count(d) AS crown_jewel_count

reports.title: Assets with PII
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE size(d.pii_types) > 0 RETURN count(d) AS pii_asset_count

reports.title: Asset Sensitivity Score Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WITH CASE WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.9 THEN '0.9-1.0 (Critical)' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.8 THEN '0.8-0.9 (Very High)' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.7 THEN '0.7-0.8 (High)' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.6 THEN '0.6-0.7 (Medium-High)' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.4 THEN '0.4-0.6 (Medium)' WHEN d.sensitivity_score >= 0.2 THEN '0.2-0.4 (Low-Medium)' ELSE '0.0-0.2 (Low)' END AS sensitivity_range RETURN sensitivity_range, count(*) AS asset_count ORDER BY asset_count DESC

reports.title: PII Type Prevalence
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE size(d.pii_types) > 0 UNWIND d.pii_types AS pii_type RETURN pii_type, count(*) AS prevalence ORDER BY prevalence DESC

reports.title: Crown Jewel Asset Details
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true})-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS asset_location, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, h.hostname AS host, h.ip AS host_ip, d.pii_types AS pii_types, size(d.pii_types) AS pii_count ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC

reports.title: Asset Distribution by Host
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) WITH h, count(d) AS asset_count, avg(d.sensitivity_score) AS avg_sensitivity ORDER BY asset_count DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN h.hostname AS hostname, h.ip AS ip, asset_count, round(avg_sensitivity * 100) / 100 AS avg_sensitivity

reports.title: Asset Scan Activity (Last 30 Days)
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE d.scan_ts IS NOT NULL AND datetime(d.scan_ts) > datetime() - duration('P30D') WITH date(datetime(d.scan_ts)) AS scan_date RETURN scan_date, count(*) AS scanned_assets ORDER BY scan_date DESC

reports.title: High-Risk PII Combinations
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE size(d.pii_types) >= 2 AND d.sensitivity_score >= $sensitivity_threshold WITH d.pii_types AS combination, count(*) AS frequency RETURN combination, frequency ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 10

reports.title: PII Count vs Sensitivity Score
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WITH size(d.pii_types) AS pii_count, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity WHERE pii_count > 0 RETURN pii_count, round(avg(sensitivity) * 100) / 100 AS avg_sensitivity, count(*) AS asset_count ORDER BY pii_count

reports.title: Assets by PII Type
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WHERE $pii_type IN d.pii_types RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS asset_location, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, d.pii_types AS all_pii_types, d.crown_jewel AS is_crown_jewel ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC

reports.title: PII Asset Network
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) WHERE size(d.pii_types) >= 2 OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) RETURN d, h, v LIMIT 30

reports.title: Asset Risk by Vulnerability Exposure
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH d, h, count(v) AS vuln_count WHERE d.sensitivity_score >= 0.6 RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS asset_location, d.sensitivity_score AS sensitivity, h.hostname AS host, vuln_count, CASE WHEN vuln_count = 0 THEN 'No Vulnerabilities' WHEN vuln_count <= 2 THEN 'Low Risk' WHEN vuln_count <= 5 THEN 'Medium Risk' ELSE 'High Risk' END AS risk_level ORDER BY d.sensitivity_score DESC, vuln_count DESC

reports.title: Crown Jewel Vulnerability Exposure
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset {crown_jewel: true})-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH d, h, collect(v) AS vulnerabilities, count(v) AS vuln_count RETURN d.location_pseudonym AS crown_jewel_asset, h.hostname AS host, vuln_count, [v IN vulnerabilities WHERE v.cvss >= 7.0 | v.cve_id] AS high_severity_cves ORDER BY vuln_count DESC

reports.title: Composite Risk Score Distribution
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset)-[:RESIDES_ON]->(h:Host) OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(v:Vulnerability) WITH d, count(v) AS vuln_count, avg(COALESCE(v.cvss, 0)) AS avg_cvss WITH d.sensitivity_score + (vuln_count * 0.1) + (avg_cvss * 0.1) AS risk_score, d RETURN CASE WHEN risk_score >= 1.0 THEN 'Critical Risk' WHEN risk_score >= 0.8 THEN 'High Risk' WHEN risk_score >= 0.6 THEN 'Medium Risk' WHEN risk_score >= 0.4 THEN 'Low Risk' ELSE 'Minimal Risk' END AS risk_category, count(*) AS asset_count ORDER BY asset_count DESC

reports.title: Asset Protection Coverage (ActionCards)
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)<-[:AFFECTS]-(ac:ActionCard) WITH d, count(ac) AS actioncard_count, d.crown_jewel AS is_crown_jewel RETURN CASE WHEN actioncard_count > 0 THEN 'Protected' ELSE 'Unprotected' END AS protection_status, is_crown_jewel, count(*) AS asset_count

reports.title: Compliance Gap Analysis
reports.query: MATCH (d:DataAsset) WITH CASE WHEN d.crown_jewel = true AND size([ac IN [(d)<-[:AFFECTS]-(ac:ActionCard) | ac] WHERE ac.status IN ['approved', 'executing', 'completed']]) = 0 THEN 'Crown Jewel - No Active Protection' WHEN size(d.pii_types) >= 2 AND d.sensitivity_score < 0.6 THEN 'PII Asset - Low Sensitivity Score' WHEN d.scan_status <> 'scanned' THEN 'Unscanned Asset' ELSE 'Compliant' END AS compliance_status RETURN compliance_status, count(*) AS asset_count ORDER BY asset_count DESC
